figures.caption: Figure 2: The overall architecture of KnowPilot. This framework integrates three types of heterogeneous knowledge sources: task-specific priors, experiential knowledge, and explicit knowledge. At the bottom of the figure, we illustrate a case of KnowPilot in domain-specific writing.
Figure 3: Visual illustration of the proposed KnowPilot framework that integrates three heterogeneous knowledge sources for guiding text generation

Figure 4: We present three case studies of KnowPilot in the finance, medical, and industrial domains, illustrating how the KnowPilot integrates task-specific priors, explicit knowledge and experiential knowledge to more effectively meet user requirements and how users interact with KnowPilot.
